Function to create and export a map showing block group overlap with isochrones

Source: R/mysterycall_map_block_group.R
mysterycall_map_block_group.Rd

This function creates a map that displays block groups and their overlap with isochrones. The map is exported as an HTML file and a PNG image.

Usage

mysterycall_map_block_group(
  bg_data,
  isochrones_data,
  output_dir = "figures/"
)

Arguments

bg_data

A SpatialPolygonsDataFrame representing block group data.

isochrones_data

A SpatialPolygonsDataFrame representing isochrone data.

output_dir

Directory path for exporting the map files. Default is "figures/".

Value

Called for its side effects of saving the block group overlap map as HTML and PNG inside output_dir. Returns NULL invisibly.

See also

Other mapping: mysterycall_plot_density(), mysterycall_plot_isochrones(), mysterycall_create_isochrones(), mysterycall_isochrones_for_df(), mysterycall_plot_line(), mysterycall_plot_scatter(), mysterycall_map_acog_districts(), mysterycall_map_base(), mysterycall_map_leaflet(), mysterycall_map_physicians()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Create and export the map with the default output directory
mysterycall_map_block_group(block_groups, isochrones_joined_map)

# Create and export the map with a custom output directory
mysterycall_map_block_group(block_groups, isochrones_joined_map, "custom_output/")
} # }
